parameters.name: sgml
parameters.label: Parse SGML/HTML
parameters.description: If enabled, the input should be in SGML/HTML format. This includes form data. If disabled, XML format is assumed.

parameters.name: merge
parameters.label: Merge
parameters.description: Merge and label can be used to combine two inputs of data. The second input must be XML formatted, and not SGML/HTML. These two parameters control where and how the second input is merged.

parameters.name: mlabel
parameters.label: Label
parameters.description: Specify the element at which the merge occurs.

parameters.name: label
parameters.label: Label
parameters.description: Element labels must match this parameter.

parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Element types must match this parameter.

parameters.name: text
parameters.label: Text
parameters.description: Element text must match this parameter.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: If an element contains attributes, at least one must have a name matching this parameter.

parameters.name: value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: If an element contains attributes, at least one must have a value matching this parameter.

parameters.name: plabel
parameters.label: Parent Label
parameters.description: Elements must have a parent whose label matches this parameter.

parameters.name: ptype
parameters.label: Parent Type
parameters.description: Elements must have a parent whose type matches this parameter.

parameters.name: ptext
parameters.label: Parent Text
parameters.description: Elements must have a parent whose text matches this parameter.

parameters.name: pname
parameters.label: Parent Name
parameters.description: Elements must have a parent with an attribute whose name matches this parameter.

parameters.name: pvalue
parameters.label: Parent Value
parameters.description: Elements must have a parent with an attribute whose value matches this parameter.

parameters.name: oaname
parameters.label: Name Attributes
parameters.description: Only output attributes whos name match this parameter.

parameters.name: oavalue
parameters.label: Value Attributes
parameters.description: Only output attributes whose value match this parameter.

parameters.name: oclabel
parameters.label: Children Labels
parameters.description: Only output children whose label match this parameter.

parameters.name: show
parameters.label: Show
parameters.description: This controls how the selected elements are presented.

parameters.name: lprefix
parameters.label: Label Prefix
parameters.description: This determines whether or not the element label is prefixed when outputting tables or attributes or children.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.
